torch_pattern: torch.nn.functional.batch_norm(input=in_data, running_mean=mean_data, running_var=var_data, weight=weight_torch, bias=bias_torch, training=training, momentum=momentum, eps=eps)

constraints: running_mean and running_var must be defined when training=False (evaluation mode)
input tensors must be INTERLEAVED memory layout

weight_transform: weight/bias/running_mean/running_var reshaped to [1, C, 1, 1]; ttnn.from_torch(t, dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device); no transposition required

placement_observations.source: unit test: 'Input tensors to batch norm must be interleaved' (xfail when mem_layout is not ttnn.TensorMemoryLayout.INTERLEAVED)
unit test: ttnn.batch_norm(..., memory_config=sharded_mem_config, output=output_tensor) — output may be sharded even though inputs must be interleaved
unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default interleaved memory config
